text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's the fall of Agnes Digital's junior<n>year, and the
other runners are<n>staying active throughout this
season.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! I'm over here! Finally,<n>the big race is
starting! I've been<n>dying to see this!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The start of this year's Mile<n>Championship is just
moments<n>away! Who do you think will be first<n>to
fly down the final stretch!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Here's King Halo coming in from<n>outside! King
Halo! King Halo finishes<n>second!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Did you see that, King fans? It's a<n>shame I
couldn't finish first, but...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I've found my new path on the Sprint<n>and Mile
tour! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear the confidence in her<n>voice?! Ohhhh,
the tears are flowing<n>down my face like
waterfalls!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you get what she's talking about?<n>Do you
want me to explain? I'm<n>gonna explain, okay?
Omg, I really<n>can't turn off the waterworks!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She goes on without giving me a<n>moment to
respond.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
King was always focusing on going<n>down the
traditional route in order to<n>prove her skill to her
mother because<n>she respects her so much!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But then! Oh, man! She wowed<n>everyone by
changing paths this<n>year! She turned her back on
what<n>she once longed for.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She's showing us that being true to<n>herself and
finding her own path is<n>the best way to gain her
mother's<n>respect!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
She struggled a lot after making her<n>decision, but
she's overcome those<n>doubts today! I know all
about how<n>difficult that was for her! I could fill my
entire timeline talking about it!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to stop her once she gets<n>going about
Umamusume. Running on<n>the track herself has
only deepened<n>her attachment.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: On the way back...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Quick, Trainer. Hide.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
There's another Umamusume lost in<n>a chasm of
worry, just like King was.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Look, there she is...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Everyone was so incredible,yet... here I am...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto's progress has slowed<n>recently, allowing
Opera O to rocket<n>ahead of her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O has been the center of<n>attention at the
Classics, so, naturally,<n>she's considered the
favorite for the<n>Arima Kinen this year.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Meanwhile, Doto still hasn't run in a<n>single G1
race yet.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The old me would simply bask in the<n>inspiration
from Doto trying her<n>hardest...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
But now that I've debuted, I feel like I<n>understand
her struggle a little.
choice_data_list: If only she knew what's causing her slump.
If only she knew what's causing her slump.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know exactly what's causing it. It's<n>clear as
day.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital claims to understand so<n>casually
that I have to ask her what<n>the reason is.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...Which is to say, Doto isn't fully<n>race-ready yet.
She's still growing.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You know about Umamusume's<n>race-readiness,
right? It's the time<n>when they transform from cute
little<n>sprouts into fiery smokeshows.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Doto is what you'd consider a late<n>bloomer.
She's still waiting to sprout.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
So there's really no need for her to<n>worry! Her
problems will resolve<n>themselves with time.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...That's my diagnosis at least,<n>speaking as
someone who has<n>observed lots and lots of
Umas.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I really hope that someone notices<n>and says
something to her. I bet you<n>that would go a long
way toward<n>easing her anxiety.
choice_data_list: What if that someone was you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who's Yu?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaagh?! M-m-m-me?!Nowaynoway! No. Waaay!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It would be way too impudent for<n>someone like me
to impose my<n>opinion on her! And what if it
somehow made things worse?! What<n>would I do?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Fans don't give advice to their idols!<n>And any fan
who forgets their place<n>gets hit with the
banhammer...
choice_data_list: But you're not just a fan anymore, are you?
But you're not just a fan anymore, are you?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
E-everyone's welcome to their own<n>opinions. But
there's an<n>unbreachable wall separating me and
Doto.
choice_data_list: How about approaching her as a fellow runner?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: A fellow runner? Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
What are you saying... Listen, I'm<n>just a plain old
runner. But Doto...<n>She's a runner with
immeasurable<n>charm.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Although... now that I'm a runner too,<n>I do kinda
have a sense of how she<n>feels...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital grows silent for a<n>moment. And
then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? You really think Ishould say something?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I still feel like it would be super<n>arrogant of me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... If a fellow simp says so, I'll try<n>and work up
the confidence. I won't<n>run away...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'll... um... just say a few words...<n>Nothing big... Oh,
but that's still taboo...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Agnes Digital hypes herself up, and<n>then...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Uhhhhh, h-hey, Doto! Do you have a<n>moment to
talk? It'll only take five<n>seconds, I promise.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Oh? Do you need something, Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Do you know about race-readiness?<n>It's pretty
useful information. If you<n>want, I can tell you about
it a bit. So,<n>basically, you know how you're an
Umamusume...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Later that night, Agnes Digital is<n>feeling down.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I really did it now. I went up to<n>the real-life
Doto and totally lost it...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I lectured her for ten whole minutes! I<n>was
babbling away as fast as a<n>machine gun!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I just want to go throw myself at her<n>feet and beg
for forgiveness...
choice_data_list: Do you think what you said is going to help her?
Do you think what you said is going to help her?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I... I don't have enough self-esteem<n>left to even
dare hope so... I'm just a<n>chicken...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I know I've debuted and all that, but<n>I'm still only
supposed to simp quietly<n>from the sidelines... How
could I have<n>forgotten myself like that?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital broke her vow of<n>non-intervention.
What happens now,<n>nobody knows.
